outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected: Aggregate GEX is deeply negative (-6.76B), indicating dealers are short gamma and will amplify price movements.
outlook.summary: Market is heavily short gamma with extreme Put/Call ratios (>2.0) and bearish skew. Spot is pinned at 0DTE Max Pain (670), facing immediate resistance from the Aggregate Gamma Flip (676.66). A failure to hold 670 targets the massive structural support at 660.

Intraday structural pivot. Crossing this shifts dealer flows from stabilizing to accelerating.
Secondary structural support with massive Monthly OI (122k). Downside target if 660 breaks.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Amplified volatility due to negative aggregate GEX (-1.83B)
outlook.summary: Market is in a short gamma regime, dealers will amplify moves. Heavy put walls at 590 suggest strong structural support, but bearish skew and high PCR indicate downside pressure. Price is attracted to 600 Max Pain.

Monthly reverse smirk and low OI PCR (0.19) confirm bullish positioning. No visible PUT walls above spot clears path for continuation.
